Journal.Title: Journal of thoracic oncology : official publication of the International Association for the Study of Lung Cancer

Article.ArticleTitle: Dual Targets, Two Paths: Amivantamab: A Promising Treatment for NSCLC With Exon 14 Skipping Mutations of MET.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Medical Oncology, Kindai University Faculty of Medicine, Osaka-Sayama, Osaka, Japan.
Department of Medical Oncology, Kindai University Faculty of Medicine, Osaka-Sayama, Osaka, Japan. Electronic address: hidet31@med.kindai.ac.jp.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Disclosure Dr. Hayashi has received grants or contracts from IQVIA Services Japan, Eisai, Syneos Health Clinical, EP-CRSU, EPS Corp., Shionogi & Co., Nippon Kayaku, Otsuka Pharmaceutical, Takeda Pharmaceutical, GlaxoSmithKline, Merck Sharp & Dohme, Sanofi, Amgen, Chugai Pharmaceutical, Taiho Pharmaceutical, Nippon Boehringer Ingelheim, Bristol Myers Squibb Co., PRA Health Sciences, CMIC, Astellas Pharma, Pfizer R&D Japan, Ascent Development Services, Labcorp Development Japan, Kobayashi Pharmaceutical, Bayer Yakuhin, Pfizer Japan, AstraZeneca, AbbVie, Daiichi Sankyo, A2 Healthcare, Novartis Pharma, Eli Lilly Japan, Merck Biopharma, Medpace Japan, Kyowa Kirin, Japanese Gastric Cancer Association, Thoracic Oncology Research Group, Clinical Research Support Center Kyushu, West Japan Oncology Group, Japan Clinical Cancer Research Organization, Comprehensive Support Project for Oncological Research of Breast Cancer, EPS International, Mebix, Ono Pharmaceutical, Mochida Pharmaceutical, Covance Japan, Japan Clinical Research Operations, and Medical Research Support; has received payment or honoraria from Ono Pharmaceutical, Merck Biopharma, Daiichi Sankyo, 3H Clinical Trial, AstraZeneca, Novartis Pharma, Chugai Pharmaceutical, Bristol Myers Squibb Co., Eli Lilly Japan, Amgen, Merck Sharp & Dohme, Sysmex Corp., Pfizer Japan, Takeda Pharmaceutical, Nippon Boehringer Ingelheim, Janssen Pharmaceutical, and Guardant Health Japan; and has been a member of data safety monitoring or advisory boards of Bristol Myers Squibb Co., AbbVie, Chugai Pharmaceutical, Novocure, AstraZeneca, Daiichi Sankyo, and Janssen Pharmaceutical. Dr. Murata has no conflicts of interest to disclose.
